prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约 3511→4346→5325→4842→7323，整体呈明显后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 4000 名；2025 年基准约 7323 名，较 2024 年大幅后移约 2481 名，波动显著；本省理科计划 2021 年 14 人、2022 年 13 人、2023 年 14 人、2024 年 12 人、2025 年（物理类）15 人；2026 年物理类计划 16 人，较 2025 年扩招 1 人（+6.7%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升（2021 年第 83→2025 年第 69→2026 年第 71），稳居全国前 70–80 名区间，学校层次稳步提升对考生吸引力有正向作用；2025 年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因生命科学学院就业率仅 4.63% 引发关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；2026 年周期内未见新增重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 62 位（一般），以校园美景为主要传播内容，整体曝光中等；民族学 A+、生态学 A、统计学 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科；生态学、统计学等与招生专业（生态学菁英班、统计学、环境科学与工程类）直接关联，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度持续偏高（2024 年高热推荐），云南大学在青海理科投放计算机类、数据科学、电子信息工程等热门专业，对考生吸引力较强；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 48000 人（不确定标记），按历史比例估算物理类约 30672 人，较 2025 年物理类 30457 人微增约 0.7%，竞争略有加剧。；云南大学位于云南省昆明市，属西南地区，与青海省同属西部，地域偏好上无明显优势或劣势；该校在青海省招生规模较小（理科 15–16 人），属外省招生，无本地保护效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（+1 人）与考生微增（约 +0.7%）的供需博弈、学校排名持续提升的正面效应、以及计算机类等热门专业的吸引力，预计 2026 年理科最低位次在 7323 名基础上略有前移；预测最低位次约 7566 名，区间 7066–8066 名。

- 计算机科学与技术
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 经济学（经济学+统计学双学士学位）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息工程
- 软件工程

- 统计学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 7066–8066 名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择（电子信息工程、软件工程、大气科学等），一档专业（计算机科学与技术、数据科学）可冲刺，三档专业（材料、环境、工商管理）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7066）可重点冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3511→4346→5325→4842→7323, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7323, a significant backward shift of about 2481 places compared to 2024, with notable fluctuations; the provincial science enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 15 in 2025 (physics category); the 2026 physics category plan is 16, an increase of 1 (+6.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science list has been rising in recent years (83rd in 2021→69th in 2025→71st in 2026), steadily within the national top 70–80 range, and the steady improvement in university level has a positive effect on attracting candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences being only 4.63%, which may have suppressed some candidates' willingness to apply; no new major negative events were reported in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity total ranking is 62nd (average), with campus scenery as the main content, overall exposure moderate; Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, a total of 3 A- and above disciplines; Ecology, Statistics, etc. are directly related to enrollment majors (Ecology Elite Class, Statistics, Environmental Science and Engineering), attracting some candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024); Yunnan University offers popular majors like Computer Science, Data Science, and Electronic Information Engineering in Qinghai's science category, which strongly attract candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in the province is about 48,000 (uncertain mark), with an estimated physics category of about 30,672 based on historical proportions, a slight increase of about 0.7% compared to the 2025 physics category of 30,457, slightly intensifying competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Yunnan Province, in the southwest region, and both Qinghai and Yunnan are in the western region, with no obvious advantage or disadvantage in regional preference; the university's enrollment scale in Qinghai is small (15–16 science students), belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with no local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1) and the slight increase in candidates (about +0.7%) in supply-demand dynamics, the positive effect of the university's rising ranking, and the attractiveness of popular majors like Computer Science, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 7323 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7566, with a range of 7066–8066.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Economics (Economics + Statistics Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Electronic Information Engineering
- Software Engineering
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Atmospheric Science
- Statistics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Business Administration
- Civil Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7066–8066, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Software Engineering, Atmospheric Science, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Environment, Business Administration) as safety choices; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7066), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 663 → 2301 → 729 → 1095 → 1000, showing significant fluctuations. After an abnormal shift in 2022, the rankings have stabilized in the 729–1095 range over the past three years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1000. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 6 students in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 4 in 2025 (history category); the 2026 history category plan is 4 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been steadily rising (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026), indicating a steady improvement in university level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to concerns about low employment rates in the School of Life Sciences. No major negative events were reported in the 2026 cycle. Douyin popularity is average, with campus scenery being the main content. Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), but it does not directly correspond to liberal arts enrollment majors. Statistics is A-, which has some relevance to economics majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is approximately 48,000. Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of history category takers is about 17,328, a slight increase of about 0.7% from 17,212 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, and has a very small liberal arts enrollment scale in Qinghai Province (4 students), making it an out-of-province enrollment with no local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable rankings in the 729–1095 range over the past three years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase of about 0.7% in the number of examinees, the positive effect of the university's rising ranking, and the slight suppression from a negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will shift slightly downward from the baseline of 1000. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1015, with a range of 761–1269.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 761–1269, with only 3 liberal arts enrollment majors, it is recommended to choose the Tier 2 History Base Class as a safe option, while Tier 1 Law and Chinese Language and Literature can be attempted as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<761), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
